artifact_name: ICT risk management framework
description: Documented framework covering ICT governance, risk controls, and resilience metrics.

artifact_name: ICT third-party register of information
description: Contractual, criticality, and service dependency registry for ICT providers.

artifact_name: CDE network and data flow diagrams
description: Current diagrams showing card data environment boundaries and connected systems.

artifact_name: Quarterly ASV and penetration test evidence
description: External/internal vulnerability scans and penetration testing outcomes.

artifact_name: SWIFT CSP attestation package
description: Evidence for mandatory/advisory controls and annual attestation.

artifact_name: ITGC control operation evidence
description: Access, change, and operations control evidence supporting SOX reporting controls.

artifact_name: Written information security program
description: GLBA safeguards-aligned security program and risk assessment evidence.

artifact_name: Transaction monitoring and SAR evidence
description: Rule logic, alert handling, and SAR filing evidence.

artifact_name: Order handling and best execution evidence
description: Procedures and records proving compliant order handling and transaction reporting.

artifact_name: Sanctions screening governance and tuning evidence
description: Documented sanctions screening model governance, threshold tuning, and escalation workflow evidence.

artifact_name: SCA exemption decision register
description: Decision log and monitoring evidence for TRA, low-value, and recurring-payment SCA exemptions.

artifact_name: Credit model validation and fairness testing evidence
description: Model change logs, challenger testing, fairness metrics, and adverse-action explainability evidence.

artifact_name: Critical ICT provider exit and substitution playbook
description: Operational exit plan evidence for critical ICT providers including failover tests and dependency mappings.

artifact_name: Instant payment fraud scenario test evidence
description: Scenario-based tests for APP fraud controls, mule interdiction, and high-velocity transfer escalation.

artifact_name: Cloud control-plane compromise simulation evidence
description: Detection, response, and recovery drill evidence for cloud IAM/control-plane compromise in critical financial services.

artifact_name: GDPR security of processing assurance pack
description: Risk assessment, technical controls, and incident workflow evidence for protection of financial personal data.

artifact_name: CCPA consumer rights and disclosure handling evidence
description: Evidence of notice, request fulfillment, and disclosure controls for covered California consumer financial information.

artifact_name: VAIT ICT governance and control evidence
description: Institution-level ICT governance evidence aligned to BaFin supervisory expectations for risk management and operations.

artifact_name: Solvency II prudential reporting controls evidence
description: QRT production, validation, and governance evidence for insurer supervisory submissions.

artifact_name: State-specific breach notification playbooks
description: Jurisdiction-specific notification decision trees, regulator thresholds, and template communications.

artifact_name: NYDFS annual certification and incident governance evidence
description: Annual compliance certification package and incident reporting governance artifacts for NY-regulated entities.

artifact_name: Periodic risk assessment (23 NYCRR 500.09)
description: Written risk assessment covering confidentiality, integrity, and availability of information systems and nonpublic information, refreshed on a risk-based cadence and before material changes.

artifact_name: Annual penetration test and continuous vulnerability assessment evidence (23 NYCRR 500.05)
description: Annual penetration test reports plus continuous monitoring / automated vulnerability scan records, including remediation tracking.

artifact_name: Audit trails for material cybersecurity events (23 NYCRR 500.06)
description: Protected audit trails that reconstruct material financial transactions and detect/respond to cybersecurity events, retained per 500.06 requirements.

artifact_name: Access privileges and identity management records (23 NYCRR 500.07)
description: Role definitions, periodic access reviews, privileged account management logs, and least-privilege enforcement artifacts.

artifact_name: Third-party service provider security policy and due diligence (23 NYCRR 500.11)
description: Written TPSP policy, due diligence questionnaires, contractual security addenda, and periodic reassessment records covering all third-party service providers with access to nonpublic information.

artifact_name: Multi-factor authentication coverage evidence (23 NYCRR 500.12)
description: Evidence of MFA for all remote access to internal networks, all remote access to third-party applications with nonpublic information, and all privileged accounts.

artifact_name: Cybersecurity awareness training and monitoring records (23 NYCRR 500.14)
description: Annual cybersecurity awareness training completion records, phishing exercise results, and authorized-user activity monitoring logs.

artifact_name: Written incident response plan (23 NYCRR 500.16)
description: Board-approved incident response plan covering internal processes, goals, roles, external communication, remediation steps, documentation, post-incident revision, and tabletop exercise records.

artifact_name: CASP operating controls and safeguarding evidence
description: Governance, safeguarding, and monitoring evidence for crypto-asset service provider control operation.

artifact_name: AMLD5 CDD and ongoing monitoring evidence
description: CDD policy artifacts, risk scoring evidence, and periodic review records for EU onboarding and payments.

artifact_name: AMLD6 enhanced financial-crime control evidence
description: Control evidence for enhanced monitoring, escalation, and investigative response over higher-risk behaviors.

artifact_name: MAR surveillance and alert adjudication evidence
description: End-to-end surveillance tuning, alert review, and suspicious transaction reporting evidence.

artifact_name: PSR payment operations assurance evidence
description: Operational evidence for payment routing resilience, exception handling, and scheme compliance controls.

artifact_name: Qualified certificate lifecycle and trust-service evidence
description: Certificate issuance, revocation, and assurance records supporting qualified trust service usage in financial flows.

artifact_name: BIPA biometric consent and retention control evidence
description: Signed consent evidence, retention schedule operation, and biometric deletion control attestations.
